offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We streamline payment reminders and processing instead of manual tracking.
problem: Late payments leading to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Participate in community forums for Etsy sellers
try_it: Let users try online payment processing on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
